news.t: Cambria Investment Management and Chesapeake Capital Corporation Announces the Launch of the Cambria Chesapeake Pure Trend ETF ($MFUT)

overview.description: The Cambria Chesapeake Pure Trend ETF (MFUT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed fund that seeks capital preservation and appreciation through a trend-following strategy that targets opportunities across currencies, commodities, fixed income, and equities. MFUT was launched on May 29, 2024 and is issued by Cambria.
